    <section class="u-align-center u-black u-clearfix u-container-align-center u-section-2" id="block-1">
      <div class="u-clearfix u-sheet u-valign-middle-md u-valign-middle-sm u-valign-middle-xs u-sheet-1">

            <h2 class="u-blog-control u-text u-text-1">
              <a class="u-post-header-link" href="https://gocyc.ae/al-hudayriyat-cycling-track/?lang=en">Al Hudayriyat Cycling Track: Abu Dhabi’s Bike Hub</a>
            </h2>
            <div class="u-blog-control u-metadata u-metadata-1"><span class="u-meta-date u-meta-icon">June 10, 2024</span><span class="u-meta-category u-meta-icon"><a class="u-textlink" href="https://gocyc.ae/category/tracks/?lang=en" rel="category tag">Tracks</a></span><span class="u-meta-comments u-meta-icon"><a class="u-textlink" href="https://gocyc.ae/al-hudayriyat-cycling-track/?lang=en#respond">Comments (0)</a></span>
            </div>
            <div class="u-align-justify u-blog-control u-post-content u-text u-text-2"><div class="wp-block-post-author-name has-small-font-size">Khaled Assakaf Al Hashmi</div>


<p><em>Read time: 4 minutes</em></p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Introduction: Why Hudayriyat Is Abu Dhabi’s Cycling Sanctuary</strong></h2>



<p>Al Hudayriyat Island has transformed into more than a leisure park, it’s now one of <strong>Abu Dhabi’s premier cycling destinations in 2025</strong>. With Al Hudayriyat cycling track’s paved loops, rugged MTB trails, scenic waterfront sections, bike rental shops, and venues for global cycling competitions, it offers something for every type of rider.</p>



<p>The newly developed Hudayriat Island is a whole island dedicated to sports and beach activities. The Leisure and Entertainment District ranking currently as one of the most visited cycling tracks in the heart of Abu Dhabi on al Hudayriat Island. With 28km of designated cycling tracks and a bike park featuring three different asphalt tracks, as well as a separate BMX facility. Open 24 hours, 7 days a week, for free.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>The Network: Paved Loops & Trail X Mountain Biking</strong></h2>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Main Cycling Tracks: 5 km, 10 km & 15 km Loops</strong></h3>



<p>Hudayriyat provides <strong>smooth, dedicated paved loops</strong> measuring approximately <strong>5 km</strong>, <strong>10 km</strong>, and longer <strong>15 km</strong> circuits. These interlocking loops cater to beginners, intermediate, and fitness riders alike. These well-maintained paths meander along green zones and beaches, with excellent separation from traffic.</p>



<p>You may find on al Hudayriat Cycling Track rental options with:</p>



<p><strong>Trail X MTB: Abu Dhabi’s First Mountain Bike Trail</strong></p>



<figure class="wp-block-image"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1000" height="667" src="https://gocyc.ae/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/0008_Trial-x-Gallery-images-09-1_1.jpg" alt="" class="wp-image-859" srcset="https://gocyc.ae/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/0008_Trial-x-Gallery-images-09-1_1.jpg 1000w, https://gocyc.ae/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/0008_Trial-x-Gallery-images-09-1_1-300x200.jpg 300w, https://gocyc.ae/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/0008_Trial-x-Gallery-images-09-1_1-768x512.jpg 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 709px) 85vw, (max-width: 909px) 67vw, (max-width: 1362px) 62vw, 840px"></figure>



<p></p>



<p>Trail X spans <strong>15 km</strong> of uninterrupted off-road terrain, inaugurated in <strong>November 2021</strong>. It includes four difficulty levels:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Green (8.9 km)</strong> – beginner-friendly</li>



<li><strong>Blue (2.8 km)</strong> – moderate challenge</li>



<li><strong>Red (1.9 km)</strong> – advanced</li>



<li><strong>Black (1.9 km)</strong> – high-adrenaline terrain, up to <strong>10 m rises</strong></li>
</ul>



<p>It’s the only MTB trail of its kind in Abu Dhabi. Designed to international standards, Trail X features integrated overpasses with paved loops and xeriscape landscaping for immersive riding</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Riding Over the Water: Hudayriyat’s Scenic Sea Section</strong></h2>



<figure class="wp-block-image"><img loading="lazy" decoding="async" width="1000" height="666" src="https://gocyc.ae/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/cycling-3_0.jpg" alt="" class="wp-image-860" srcset="https://gocyc.ae/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/cycling-3_0.jpg 1000w, https://gocyc.ae/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/cycling-3_0-300x200.jpg 300w, https://gocyc.ae/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/cycling-3_0-768x511.jpg 768w" sizes="auto, (max-width: 709px) 85vw, (max-width: 909px) 67vw, (max-width: 1362px) 62vw, 840px"></figure>



<p></p>



<p>One of the most unique features is a <strong>raised section of track crossing over the sea</strong>, offering panoramic views of the Gulf and skyline, especially stunning at sunrise or sunset. Riders describe it as a symbolic highlight and popular photo spot.</p>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Facilities: Rentals, Shops, Club & Community Hub</strong></h2>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Bike Rental Options</strong>: Starting at 50AED per hour
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Yas Cycles</strong> offers rentals from AED 50/hour or AED 150/day (open 6AM–11 PM).</li>



<li><strong>Wolfi’s</strong> rents road bikes, e‑bikes, and children’s bikes on-site at the cycle track, find it more on their pricing through their <a href="https://app.booking.bike.rent/book?store=wolfis">rental booking platform</a> (open 6AM-10PM)</li>
</ul>
</li>



<li><strong>Abu Dhabi Cycling Club (ADCC)</strong>:
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Developing a <strong>cycling hub</strong> on Hudayriyat including indoor smart cycling, event plaza, club HQ, and storage aligned with UCI standards. The Service Course Café is open within their facilities from 7AM-10PM alongside changing rooms, showers and Wolfi’s High Performance and Recovery Centre, offering cold water therapy and many other services.</li>
</ul>
</li>



<li><strong>321 Sports and Circuit X</strong>:
<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Nearby <strong>321 Sports hub</strong> includes courts, gym, bike studio, cafe, and is open daily from early morning till midnight</li>



<li><strong>Circuit X</strong> adventure hub offers BMX, skatepark, rope courses, and is open till late evenings.</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>



<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Connectivity: Part of Abu Dhabi’s Broader Network</strong></h2>



<p>Hudayriyat’s paved loops connect seamlessly with Abu Dhabi’s <strong>main island cycling network</strong>, offering access to longer cross-city routes which can be seen with <strong>GOCYC’s real-time track mapping.</strong></p>



<hr class="wp-block-separator aligncenter has-alpha-channel-opacity">



<h2 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>FAQs: Al Hudayriyat Cycling Track</strong></h2>



<p><strong>Q1: How long are the paved and MTB loops?</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Paved: approx. <strong>5 km, 10 km</strong>, and extended <strong>15 km</strong> loops.</li>



<li>Trail X MTB: <strong>15 km total with four levels of difficulty</strong>.</li>
</ul>



<p><strong>Q2: Can I rent a bike on-site Al Hudayriyat Cycling Track?</strong><br>Yes. <strong>Yas Cycles</strong> and <strong>Wolfi’s</strong> rental shops are located at the track entrance and open from <strong>6AM to 10 PM daily</strong></p>



<p><strong>Q3: Is there a fee for Trail X?</strong><br>Trail X is <strong>free if you bring your own bike</strong>; rental usage incur charges, starting at 50AED per hour.</p>



<p><strong>Q4: What events are held on Al Hudayriyat Cycling Track?</strong></p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>UAE Tour Stage 2 started from Hudayriyat (2022)</li>



<li>HERO Abu Dhabi MTB race (2024) including Olympic qualifiers.</li>



<li>MyWhoosh Ramadan Races</li>



<li>FAB Annual Cycling Festival</li>



<li>And many more races, community events and rides take place on this track.</li>
</ul>



<p><strong>Q5: Are facilities available?</strong><br>Yes. <strong>Showers, rest areas, cafés</strong>, and safety infrastructure including lighting on paved loops and Trail X .</p>



<p><strong>Q6: Is it suitable for beginners and families?</strong><br>Absolutely, Green trail + paved loops are ideal for beginners and kids, while more advanced riders can take on red/black Trail X or longer circuits.</p>



<p><strong>Conclusion: Hudayriyat, Abu Dhabi’s Cycling Frontier</strong></p>



<p>From <strong>coastline loops</strong> to <strong>rugged MTB terrain</strong>, <strong>event days</strong>, and <strong>rental and club facilities</strong>, Al Hudayriyat Island is now synonymous with top-tier cycling in Abu Dhabi.</p>



<p>Whether you’re training for competition or enjoying a sunset ride with your family, Hudayriyat delivers. And if you’d like to explore more about the upcoming <strong>Hudayriyat Velodrome</strong> or broader Bike Abu Dhabi projects, stay tuned for next articles.</p>



<h1 class="wp-block-heading"><strong>Stay in the Loop, Ride with GOCYC</strong></h1>



<p>Want to keep up with real-time updates on cycling routes and events across Abu Dhabi and the UAE?</p>



<p><strong>Download the GOCYC app</strong> — your ultimate companion for discovering, tracking, and sharing your cycling journeys.<br>Whether you’re a weekend cruiser or daily commuter, <strong>GOCYC keeps you connected to the road ahead.</strong></p>

metadata.description: Explore Al Hudayriyat Island, the iconic Abu Dhabi destination with paved loops, rides over the sea, mountain-bike trails, and rental shops in 2025.,Gocyc is your bike-sharing app in the UAE. Unlock and ride bikes easily across the city. Download now on iOS and Android.

metadata.og:description: Explore Al Hudayriyat Island, the iconic Abu Dhabi destination with paved loops, rides over the sea, mountain-bike trails, and rental shops in 2025.,Read time: 4 minutes    Introduction: Why Hudayriyat Is Abu Dhabi’s Cycling Sanctuary    Al Hudayriyat Island has transformed into more than a leisure park, it’s now one of Abu Dhabi’s premier cycling destinations in 2025. With Al Hudayriyat cycling track's paved loops, rugged MTB trails, scenic waterfront sections, bike rental shops, and venues,Explore, unlock, and ride bikes with Gocyc. Available on iPhone and Android.
